description: Our Diesel driven 2020 Land Rover Discovery HSE Luxury 4WD in Fuji White is both rugged and refined! Motivated by a TurboCharged 3.0 Liter Diesel 6 Cylinder offering 254hp and 443lb-ft of torque to an 8 Speed Automatic transmission for unrelenting capability. A powerful towing machine, our Four Wheel Drive SUV masters every move you make with advanced all-terrain technology and an electronic air suspension, and it returns nearly 26mpg on the highway. Our Discovery also delivers upscale good looks with LED lighting, signature headlamps, 20-inch alloy wheels, a hands-free tailgate, and a dual-pane sunroof.   The sophisticated HSE Luxury cabin has first-class accommodations for seven passengers plus Windsor leather heated front and rear seats, power-folding back rows, a power-adjustable heated leather-wrapped steering wheel, and impressively crafted accents. To go with those creature comforts, there's a 12.3-inch interactive driver display with a 10-inch touchscreen, full-color navigation, a rear entertainment system, WiFi compatibility, Bluetooth®, and a Meridian surround-sound audio system. It's a cockpit that dares you to go farther! description: 2010 Toyota Highlander  3.5L V6, 270 hp / 248 ft-lbs  Magnetic Gray Metallic exterior, Ash cloth interior. This Highlander does have paint fade on the hood and roof. This Highlander combines a strong V6 powerplant with a well-equipped, family-friendly interior. Estimated fuel economy is 18 MPG city and 24 MPG highway.  Performance and drivetrain - 3.5L V6 producing 270 horsepower and 248 ft-lbs of torque for confident passing and highway merging. - Paired with a smooth-shifting 5-speed automatic transmission tuned for responsive performance and reasonable highway efficiency. - Engineered for everyday driving and light-duty hauling; equipped here with a tow hitch receiver and wiring harness for towing needs.  Factory-standard features (detailed) - Safety: Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) with Electronic Brake-force Distribution (EBD), Brake Assist, Vehicle Stability Control (VSC) and Traction Control (TRAC) to help maintain control in varied conditions. Front airbags, front seat-mounted side airbags and full-length side curtain airbags protect occupants in all three seating rows. Lower Anchors and Tethers for Children (LATCH) for child seat installation. - Seating and interior: Three-row seating configuration offering flexible accommodation for passengers and cargo (seating for up to seven). Cloth upholstery in Ash, 60/40 split-folding rear seats for expanded cargo capacity, and a fold-flat third row to create a flat load floor when needed. - Comfort and convenience: Manual climate control (air conditioning) with cabin air filtration, tilt-adjustable steering column, cruise control, power windows with drivers auto-down, power door locks and remote keyless entry. - Audio and connectivity: AM/FM radio with CD/MP3 capability and auxiliary input for portable audio devices. Steering-wheel-mounted audio controls provide convenient operation while driving. - Exterior and utility: Halogen headlamps and available alloy wheels provide a durable, practical exterior. Roof rails (where equipped) for additional cargo carrying options.  Included optional equipment (installed) - Multi-functional information center: Displays trip information, average and instant fuel economy, range, and other vehicle data to assist with fuel-efficient driving and trip planning. - Daytime Running Lights: Enhance daytime visibility for added safety. - 8-way power drivers seat: Power adjustments for fore/aft, seat height, tilt and recline for tailored driver comfort. - Tow hitch receiver with wiring harness: Factory-installed hitch and wiring make towing accessories or light trailers straightforward and integrated.  Condition and summary This 2010 Highlander presents in excellent overall condition inside and out. The Magnetic Gray Metallic exterior finish is well maintained, and the Ash cloth interior shows normal, careful use consistent with the stated condition. With a capable 3.5L V6, solid safety equipment, flexible three-row seating, and the added convenience of the multi-functional information center, power drivers seat and tow hitch, this Highlander is well suited for family duties, commuting, and light towing. Cloaked in an eye-catching Performance White exterior, the car's aggressive stance is amplified by its sleek lines and distinctive Shelby badging. This head-turner embodies the spirit of power and style that the Mustang lineage is known for, offering both nostalgia and modernity in one dynamic package. Stepping inside, the Shelby GT500 treats occupants to a Charcoal Black interior with distinctive black accents, striking a perfect balance between comfort and sportiness. The cabin boasts meticulously crafted details, ensuring that each drive is as enjoyable as it is exhilarating. The manual transmission offers purists a truly engaging driving experience, allowing them to feel every nuance of the road beneath the tires. Its 5.4L 32-valve 4V DOHC supercharged and intercooled V8 engine delivers an astounding amount of power, emphasizing its muscle car heritage. Performance and handling are at the forefront with this Shelby GT500, as it merges raw horsepower with precision engineering. The responsive steering and suspension make it adept at both cruising down the highway and tackling tight corners. It stands as a testament to Ford's commitment to creating performance-driven vehicles that are both thrilling and reliable. Bright, capable, and built to work  this 2015 Ford F-350 Super Duty Crew Cab 4x4 is ready to haul, tow, and get the job done in style. Powered by Fords stout Power Stroke 6.7L biodiesel-compatible turbo V8 that produces an impressive 440 hp and 860 lb-ft of torque, this truck blends heavy-duty capability with dependable diesel economy. Paired to Fords proven automatic transmission and a stout 4x4 system, its a true workhorse with everyday comfort.  Coming to us straight out of US Forestry service in Idaho Falls, a rare Diesel Service Truck and we super lucky to get it!  Check out the cool features that area included in this truck- Premium Electronic AM/FM Stereo with single CD player and clock - Cruise Control for comfortable highway driving- Spray-in Tough Bedliner to protect the bed from wear and tear- Skid Plate Package for extra underbody protection- Center High Mount Stop Lamp (CHMSL)- Daytime Running Lights for added visibility- Black Manual Fold-Away Side Mirrors- 3.31 Electronic Locking Axle Ratio for improved traction when you need it- Electronic Shift-on-the-Fly Transfer Case for quick 2WD/4WD changes- Exhaust Brake to help take the load off your breaking system -Trailer Brake Controller for easier, safer towing- 11,200 lb GVWR  engineered for serious payloads and towing.- Heavy-duty truck architecture: purpose-built frame and suspension designed for towing, hauling and long service life. - Powertrain: robust Power Stroke 6.7L diesel turbo V8 with TorqShift automatic transmission (built for heavy loads and highway reliability). Biodiesel-capable fueling makes it flexible for many fleets and owners.- Four-wheel drive system: durable drivetrain components with the capability to transfer power where its needed for off-road or slippery conditions.- Braking and control: four-wheel anti-lock brakes (ABS) and electronic stability/traction control to help maintain control under load or in poor traction situations. - Towing-ready features: factory wiring and hitch preparation, and with the included trailer brake controller plus the high GVWR, this F-350 is set up for demanding towing tasks. - Crew Cab convenience: full-size rear doors, generous passenger room, and a configurable 40/20/40 bench for flexible cargo or passenger arrangements. This truck offers brute strength, diesel torque, and real-world refinements  a hard-working 6.7L Power Stroke with heavy-duty gearing and drivetrain options that make towing, hauling, and off-road approaches easier. The tasteful Oxford White exterior and Steel Gray interior keep things professional. Excellent overall condition, below 109,000 miles (averaging under 10,000 miles per year) and backed by a clean CARFAX report. ready to be put to work or enjoyed as a reliable daily driver. Interested in taking it for a test drive or getting more details? This F-350 is eager to show what it can do! description: 2015 Mercedes-Benz C63 S AMG For SaleThis 2015 Mercedes-Benz C63 S AMG is finished in black with blacked-out badges and the AMG Sportline styling package, giving it a clean, understated look that still reads AMG from every angle. Power comes from AMG's bi-turbo V8 paired with the 7-speed automatic, delivering the kind of effortless torque and sharp response that made the C63 S the benchmark muscle sedan of its era.Inside, it's a properly optioned AMG cabin in black leather, highlighted by the Nappa Optik covered dash and door tops, Black Ash open-pore wood trim, and the AMG Performance steering wheel trimmed in Nappa/DINAMICA. It's also equipped with AMG bucket seats, a panoramic sunroof, factory navigation, and the Burmester Surround Sound System - so it has the aggressive driving position and support you want, without losing the luxury feel Mercedes is known for.The stance is set off by 19" Vossen HF3 wheels in double-tinted gloss black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport 4S tires. description: The 2015 Mitsubishi Lancer Evolution Final Edition is a fitting send-off to an icon, blending rally-bred attitude with everyday usability in a compact, purposeful package. This special-model Evolution delivers the sharp, connected feel enthusiasts expect, while surrounding the driver with a cockpit designed for quick reactions and confident control. Up front, Xenon headlights cast a crisp, bright beam for improved visibility at night, and rain sensing wipers automatically adjust to changing conditions so you can stay focused on the road. With push-button start, getting underway is quick and convenient, and Bluetooth connectivity keeps calls and audio within easy reach, whether you're commuting or carving through back roads.----Comfort and safety are equally well considered. Automatic climate control helps maintain a consistent cabin temperature with minimal input, making daily driving more pleasant in any season. Side impact airbags add an important layer of occupant protection, supporting peace of mind alongside the Evo's reputation for planted handling. Practical touches like rear park assist sensors simplify tight parking spots and help you judge distances more accurately in garages and crowded lots. Wheel locks round out the package with an extra measure of security for the vehicle's wheels, a smart addition for an enthusiast-focused car that stands out wherever it goes.

This 2015 Chevrolet Silverado 3500HD LTZ Crew Cab Long Bed 4x4 in Deep Ocean Blue Metallic is built for serious work without sacrificing comfort. Originally priced at $68,045 MSRP, this truck delivers heavy-duty capability with premium features.  Under the hood is the legendary 6.6L Duramax Turbo Diesel paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission. With four-wheel drive, locking rear differential, integrated trailer brake controller, and factory trailering provisions for fifth wheel and gooseneck setups, this Silverado is ready to tow, haul, and handle demanding jobs with confidence. It also features an exhaust brake and engine block heater for added performance and reliability.  The LTZ trim brings comfort to the heavy-duty segment. Inside you'll find leather seats, heated and cooled front seats, heated steering wheel, adjustable pedals, seat memory, premium sound system, navigation, back-up camera, and built-in WiFi hotspot capability. This is a work truck that doesn't feel like one.  Exterior features include aluminum wheels, bed liner, tow hooks, sunroof, fog lamps, and heated power-folding mirrors with integrated turn signals.  Safety and driver assistance features include rear park assist, lane departure warning, forward collision alert, stability control, and multiple airbags.  Why buy from Greg Hubler Ford? Because we believe in Promises Kept. That means straightforward pricing, no games, and a team that values long-term relationships over one-time transactions. Every vehicle is carefully selected, and we stand behind what we sell. When you buy from Greg Hubler Ford, you get a dealership committed to making the process smooth, transparent, and professional from start to finish.  If you need a truck that works as hard as you do and still treats you well on the drive home, this Silverado 3500HD LTZ delivers.   Introducing the All New Greg Hubler Promise: The Promise. That's what you get when you purchase a new or pre-owned vehicle from Greg Hubler Ford So just what is the Greg Hubler Promise? Our New Vehicle Promise: With every new Ford purchase, you'll receive three years or forty five thousand miles of scheduled maintenance (oil changes and tire rotations). Our Used Vehicle Promise: With most pre-driven vehicle purchases, you'll receive a 12 month, 12 thousand-mile warranty as well as free oil changes and tire rotations for one year for most vehicles under 100,000 miles and less than 10 model years old at the time of sale. In addition, for both new and used purchases, The Promise gives you complimentary pick up and drop off when you bring your vehicle in for service and a free car wash and vacuum whenever you stop in! The Greg Hubler Ford Promise: it's Peace of Mind for you. Promise excludes Supplier customers. See dealer for details. description: The 2016 Toyota Tacoma TRD Off-Road V6 is a rugged and capable midsize pickup that delivers strong performance, dependable utility, and genuine off-road confidence. Built to handle both everyday driving and spirited adventures, this Tacoma blends Toyotas legendary reliability with thoughtful engineering that appeals to outdoor enthusiasts, weekend warriors, and truck buyers seeking a versatile and well-rounded ride.  Powered by a smooth and responsive V6 engine, the Tacoma offers confident acceleration and ample torque for towing, hauling, and cruising on highways or backcountry trails alike. Its TRD Off-Road configuration adds features designed to boost capability where pavement ends. With a capable suspension, enhanced shock absorbers, and available traction-boosting systems, this Tacoma is ready to take on gravel, dirt, and uneven terrain while still providing a comfortable and composed ride on paved roads.  The exterior design reflects Toyotas purposeful approach, with a bold stance, clean lines, and a rugged profile that gives the Tacoma real presence on the road. The TRD Off-Road trim adds distinctive touches that reinforce this trucks adventurous nature without sacrificing practicality. Functional details such as a durable bed, practical tie-downs, and a practical footprint make this truck ideal for both work duties and recreational gear hauling.  Inside, the cabin combines comfort and convenience with a driver-focused layout and supportive seating. The interior offers generous space for both driver and passengers, with intuitive controls and thoughtful storage solutions that make everyday use feel easy and efficient. Whether youre heading to the job site, running errands around town, or packing for a weekend outdoors, the interior delivers a welcoming and well-organized environment.  Modern technology and connectivity features help enhance the driving experience. The infotainment system provides access to media, smartphone integration, and navigation options that help keep you connected and entertained on the go. Practical storage and cargo room further boost versatility for daily needs or adventure gear.  Safety and driver-assist features are integrated to help provide added confidence behind the wheel. These systems work to support a secure and reassuring driving experience in diverse conditions and traffic situations, giving you peace of mind from daily commutes to longer journeys.  Overall, the 2016 Toyota Tacoma TRD Off-Road V6 is a capable and versatile midsize pickup that delivers strong performance, off-road readiness, everyday comfort, and long-term value. Introducing a standout 2016 Chevrolet Cruze Premier finished in eye-catching Red Hot with a Jet Black interior  a well-maintained, low-mileage example that delivers a great balance of style, efficiency and comfort. This Cruze is powered by the responsive 1.4L Turbo I4 (153 hp, 177 lb-ft) and paired with a smooth-shifting automatic transmission, delivering excellent fuel economy of approximately 30 MPG city and 42 MPG highway. With under 99,000 miles (averaging less than 9,000 miles per year) and a clean CARFAX, this vehicle is in excellent overall condition.  Factory-equipped features and highlights  Powertrain & efficiency - 1.4L turbocharged inline-4 engine producing 153 hp and 177 lb-ft of torque - Smooth automatic transmission calibrated for everyday drivability and fuel efficiency - EPA-rated fuel economy around 30 MPG city / 42 MPG highway  Exterior - Striking Red Hot paint with Premier-level exterior trim and chrome accents - RS Package appearance enhancements, including distinctive RS badging, sport-inspired grille and body accents, and a rear lip spoiler for a more athletic look - Projector-style headlamps with integrated daytime running lights and fog lamps for improved visibility - 18-inch alloy wheels in a dark finish (RS appearance), combined with all-season tires  Interior & comfort - Jet Black leather-appointed seating for refined comfort and a premium cabin feel - Heated front seats for cold-weather comfort and 60/40 split-folding rear seat for cargo flexibility - Leather-wrapped steering wheel with audio and phone controls for convenience and safety - Power accessories including windows, door locks and side mirrors - Convenient cruise control and a multi-function driver information display  Sun, Sound & Navigation Package (factory) - Power tilt-and-slide sunroof with power sunshade to let light and fresh air into the cabin - Chevrolet MyLink touchscreen infotainment system with factory-installed navigation for easy routing and destination guidance - Premium Bose audio system for rich, detailed sound and an enhanced listening experience - USB and auxiliary inputs, Bluetooth hands-free phone and audio streaming, and voice recognition for media and calls  Safety & driver assists - Rear Vision Camera for confident backing and parking - Comprehensive active safety systems including ABS brakes, traction control and electronic stability control - Full array of airbags and supplemental restraint systems for occupant protection - Tire pressure monitoring and OnStar-equipped connectivity (including available emergency/crash response and available Wi-Fi hotspot)  Condition & history - Excellent overall condition inside and out, with careful ownership and service history - Clean CARFAX vehicle history report - Low average annual mileage (under 9,000 miles per year), reflecting light use and strong long-term value  This 2016 Chevrolet Cruze Premier blends turbocharged efficiency, premium convenience features, and sporty RS styling  all presented in a striking Red Hot exterior with a Jet Black leather-appointed interior. With desirable factory packages (Sun, Sound & Navigation and RS), low miles, a clean CARFAX, and excellent condition, its a great choice for drivers seeking a refined compact sedan with real-world efficiency and comfort. Contact us to schedule a test drive or to learn more about this exceptional Cruze. Introducing the 2016 Ford Mustang GT, a stunning blend of classic American muscle and modern performance, ready to ignite your passion for driving! This iconic sports car is not just a vehicle; it's a statement. With only 63,008 miles on the odometer, this Mustang GT is primed and ready to deliver exhilarating drives for years to come.  Draped in a vibrant yellow exterior, this Mustang GT is impossible to ignore. Its bold color not only turns heads but also captures the spirit of adventure and freedom that the Mustang name embodies. The sleek lines and aggressive stance are complemented by the signature Mustang front grille, creating an aura of power and speed even when standing still.  Step inside to a world of refined performance with a black interior that perfectly balances sportiness with comfort. While the exact material is unknown, the interior is designed to keep you comfortable and in control, whether you're cruising down the highway or carving through winding roads. The cockpit is driver-focused, ensuring that every control is within easy reach, so you can focus on what matters most  the thrill of the drive.  At the heart of this beast lies a formidable 5.0L V8 engine, delivering an exhilarating 435 horsepower and 400 ft. lbs. of torque. This powerhouse ensures that every press of the pedal is met with a roar that will send shivers down your spine and a surge of adrenaline through your veins. Paired with a 6-speed manual transmission, this Mustang GT offers an engaging driving experience that true enthusiasts crave. Feel the seamless connection between you and the road as you shift through gears with precision and ease.  This 2016 Ford Mustang GT is not just about raw power; it's a testament to enduring value and exceptional performance. Recognized by Edmunds as one of the Best Retained Value Cars and a Top Recommended Coupe, this Mustang promises not only a thrilling ride but also a wise investment. Kelley Blue Book has also acknowledged its outstanding resale value, awarding it the Best Resale Value for Sports and High-Performance Cars, along with the 5-Year Cost to Own: Best High-Performance Car accolade. These honors speak volumes about the Mustang's enduring appeal and reliability.  Owning this Mustang GT means joining a legacy of performance and prestige. It's a car that commands respect on the road and admiration in your driveway. Whether you're a seasoned Mustang aficionado or a newcomer to the world of high-performance vehicles, this 2016 Mustang GT is designed to exceed your expectations and redefine your driving experience.  Don't miss your chance to own a piece of automotive history that promises both excitement and value. The 2016 Ford Mustang GT in its eye-catching yellow finish is waiting for you. It's not just a car; it's a lifestyle. Embrace the thrill, embrace the power, and make this Mustang GT yours today. Visit us for a test drive and experience firsthand why this Mustang is the perfect companion for those who dare to dream big and drive fast.

It represents one of the best value propositions for buyers who just want the fastest car for their money. There is no longer a slow Mustang and a fast Mustang; there are just fast and even faster versions. The Mustang starts at just over $24,000, a price that undercuts most of its less powerful rivals, such as the Subaru BRZ. Even when optioned out beyond the $40,000 mark, the Mustang still represents a tremendous value. description: Introducing the 2016 Nissan Quest SV, a minivan that effortlessly combines style, comfort, and performance, making it the ultimate family vehicle for those who refuse to compromise on quality or excitement. With a rich brown exterior that exudes sophistication and class, this Quest is more than just a mode of transportation; it's a statement on wheels.  Under the hood, the Quest SV is powered by a robust 3.5L V6 engine that delivers an impressive 260 horsepower and 240 ft-lbs of torque. This engine is designed to give you the power and performance you need to tackle any journey, whether it's a cross-country road trip or a quick run to the grocery store. Paired with a Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT), this minivan offers a smooth and seamless driving experience, ensuring that every ride is as enjoyable as the destination.  With 146,348 miles on the odometer, this Quest has been well-loved and is ready to embark on new adventures with you. The high mileage is a testament to its reliability and durability, showcasing its ability to stand the test of time. This is a vehicle that has proven its mettle and is eager to continue delivering unparalleled performance and comfort.  Step inside, and you'll be greeted by a spacious and thoughtfully designed interior that caters to the needs of every passenger. The Quest SV is equipped with a range of manufacturer options and packages that enhance your driving experience, providing convenience and luxury at every turn. Whether you're chauffeuring the kids to soccer practice or heading out for a weekend getaway, this minivan ensures that everyone travels in comfort and style.  The 2016 Nissan Quest SV doesn't just promise quality; it delivers on it. It's no wonder that this remarkable vehicle has earned the prestigious Kelley Blue Book's Best Resale Value award in the Van/Minivan category. This accolade is a testament to the Quest's outstanding value retention, making it a smart investment for the savvy buyer who wants a vehicle that holds its worth over time.  Imagine the peace of mind you'll feel knowing that you're driving a vehicle recognized for its exceptional value and reliability. This Quest isn't just a purchase; it's an investment in your family's future, offering practicality, performance, and prestige in one sleek package.  In summary, the 2016 Nissan Quest SV is more than just a minivanit's a lifestyle choice for those who demand the best. With its striking brown exterior, powerful V6 engine, and award-winning value retention, this vehicle is ready to meet the demands of your busy life with ease and elegance. Don't miss your chance to own a minivan that combines practicality with panache. The 2016 Nissan Quest SV is waiting to take you and your family on countless adventures, making every journey memorable. Seize the opportunity to drive home this incredible vehicle today, and experience the joy of owning a minivan that truly stands out from the crowd.

Towing and hauling capability   - Factory-installed towing provisions (receiver-type hitch and wiring provisions)   - Trailer stability control and tow-related engine/transmission calibrations designed to assist when hauling heavy loads   - Reinforced cargo box and bed tie-down points for secure load management  - Exterior and body   - Durable exterior finishes and bumpers designed for work use   - Practical steel wheels and full-size spare (configurations vary by wheel option)   - Large mirrors and available towing mirror provisions to improve visibility when towing  - Interior and comfort   - Work-focused interior with durable, easy-to-clean materials and functional storage   - Bench seating in front with a center section that can fold for an armrest or workspace (configurations can vary)   - Basic climate control (air conditioning and heating)   - Tilt steering and straightforward instrument cluster for utility-oriented operation  - Convenience and technology   - AM/FM audio system with auxiliary input (USB and Bluetooth connectivity and Ford SYNC may be factory-installed depending on original configuration)   - Cruise control and power steering to reduce fatigue during long drives   - Practical switchgear and controls laid out for ease of use while working  - Safety and security   - Electronic stability control and traction control systems to enhance vehicle stability   - Anti-lock braking (ABS) and heavy-duty brake components appropriate for a Super Duty truck   - Standard airbags for driver and front passenger; additional restraint and airbag configurations may vary by original equipment package  Notes Trim-level and factory option packages for Super Duty trucks can vary, so some specific items (infotainment features, mirror or wheel styles, towing package details, interior finishes) may differ depending on the original factory configuration. description: Selling my personal 2016 GMC Sierra 1500 Denali 4WD Crew Cab short bed. I've owned this truck for the last year and it's been great to me.Recent Service done 2k miles ago :- Bilstein shocks on all 4 corners with magride sensor delete kit. These shocks ride just as good if not better than the crappy magaride that the truck comes with from factory.- Fresh oil every 3-5k miles- New brake pads and rotors on all 4 corners- New transmission fluid along with fresh filter- Differential fluid replaced and fresh gasket installed- 4 brand new tires all 4 corners- Truck was paint corrected and ceramic coated a couple months ago- AFM ODB DisablerCons :- Carfax shows truck's odometer was rolled back 16k miles 10 years ago by a big dealer. My guess is that they rolled it back slightly so that the truck would still have factory warranty when it was resold through the auction. There is a Carfax available for free on our website if you would like to take a further look into it.- Front bumper has a couple bruises.Truck is incredibly clean. No tears in the leather. Headliner is in great shape. No leaks. All electronics function properly. Not leaking any fluids. This 2017 Subaru Forester 2.5i Premium AWD 4dr Wagon in an eye-catching red from two owners who took great care of it and kept mileage low.     It delivers the all-weather confidence Subaru is known for. Equipped with Subarus legendary AWD system, it also checks the box for shoppers searching 4WD or 4x4 capability, making it a smart choice for Wisconsin roads year-round.    The 2.5L engine paired with an automatic transmission provides smooth, efficient performance, while desirable exterior features like alloy wheels, panoramic power moonroof, roof rails, heated side mirrors, and fog lights add both style and real-world functionality.  Inside, the Premium trim focuses on comfort first with supportive cloth seating, a power drivers seat, and heated front seats, followed by excellent visibility and Subarus renowned safety engineering with stability and traction control systems.    Tech and connectivity are handled through a touchscreen infotainment system with Bluetooth audio and hands-free capability, a rearview camera, and steering wheel-mounted controls. Dual-zone automatic climate control and generous cargo space round out a cabin designed for daily driving and weekend versatility.  Compared to other compact SUVs like the Honda CR-V, Toyota RAV4, Mazda CX-5, and Ford Escape, the Forester stands out for its standard all-wheel-drive capability, upright wagon design with excellent cargo flexibility, and strong reputation for long-term durability, making it a practical and confident choice in its class.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Exhaust Tip Color - description: Chicago Motors Inc. is your number-one source for pre-owned police and government vehicles. Since 1988, our family-owned and operated business has been providing quality vehicles to police car enthusiasts and fleet buyers worldwide. From serving small and mid-sized government agencies and the taxi industry to catering to Blues Brothers and Hollywood fans around the globe, police cars are part of our DNA. As a second-generation family business, our passion for police vehicles goes beyond businessits a lifelong commitment. Vehicles in our inventory are individually hand selected from across the country, mechanically reconditioned, cosmetically detailed, specifically photographed and marketed, and personally test-driven to ensure the highest quality pre-owned police cars on the market. Our selection includes over 250 vehicles spanning three major makesChevrolet, Ford, and Dodge, and 13 submodels of their respective police and government vehicle trims. Visit us online at ChicagoMotors.com to browse our up-to-date inventory, view up to 50+ images per unit, and access free Carfax reports. We take pride in our 5-star customer service and offer best-in-class remote purchase assistance. Nationwide and International Shipping: We provide door-to-door nationwide shipping and can ship to all major US portsfor international buyers. Need help finding the perfect vehicle? Contact our knowledgeable sales staff to schedule a visit or test drive. We are here to assist you with any questions or processes involved in acquiring your ideal pre-owned police car. Appointments are highly recommended for in-person visits, as advertised vehicles are stored in multiple lots within our neighborhood. Call us at 773-235-6500 or email us at sales@chicagomotors.com. Our prompt and dedicated sales team is available and ready to assist. Reach out anytimewe look forward to hearing from you!

Vehicle Details: Practical power meets comfort in this 2017 Ford Explorer XLT 4WD, now available in Brunswick, OH  priced to sell with the best value in the area. Powered by a smooth and reliable V6 3.5L gasoline engine and equipped with four-wheel drive, this Ford Explorer handles Ohio roads and weekend adventures with confidence, whether you're tackling snow, towing gear, or cruising the highway.  Step inside to premium leather seats and a heated steering wheel that keep every drive comfortable in any season. Automatic climate control maintains the perfect cabin temperature, while remote start gives you instant warmth or cooling before you step outside. The convenient back-up camera enhances safety and parking ease, making tight spots and busy lots simple to negotiate.  This XLT combines rugged capability with upscale amenities: roomy seating for family and friends, versatile cargo space for errands or road trips, and thoughtful features designed for daily convenience. description: CARFAX One-Owner. Clean CARFAX. Iridium Silver Metallic 2018 Mercedes-Benz GLC GLC 300 4MATIC® 4MATIC® 9-Speed Automatic 2.0L Turbocharged Carfax 1-Owner, CLEAN CARFAX!!, LOCAL TRADE IN!!!.  Each vehicle undergoes a comprehensive inspection including: powertrain, exterior, interior, electronics, safety systems, undercarriage and a road test. Lexus trained technicians inspect every aspect of the pre-owned vehicle. Ask your Salesperson for a copy of the inspection and see what was noted and repaired on your next vehicle!  Recent Arrival! 21/28 City/Highway MPG  The 2018 Mercedes Benz GLC 300 4MATIC is the kind of SUV that immediately communicates confidence and refinement the moment you see it, and even more once you get behind the wheel. Its sculpted body lines, bold front grille, and signature LED lighting give it a modern, upscale presence without ever feeling flashy. Its the perfect blend of luxury and practicality, making it equally at home in the city, the mountains, or anywhere in between.  Open the door and you step into a cabin that feels thoughtfully crafted, not just assembled. High quality materials, a clean and contemporary design, and that unmistakable Mercedes attention to detail surround you from every angle. The seats are supportive yet comfortable for long drives, and the layout of controls feels intuitive and refined. The panoramic sunroof, if equipped, expands the sense of space and brings in natural light, creating an inviting environment for both driver and passengers. description: This *2018 Toyota RAV4 LE*, has a Magnetic Gray Metallic exterior and an Black interior color. 153,507 miles. Stock Number T26179Y. You can connect with us by calling 336-566-2022. This vehicle is offered by Classic Toyota of Wilkesboro and we are located at 1511 W D St North Wilkesboro NC 28659No Accidents!*Important Package and Feature Information*=== Convenience ===  *  Distance pacing cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. Distance pacing cruise control; your ultimate co-pilot.=== Safety and Security ===  *  Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.  *  Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.  *  Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.  *  Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.At Classic Toyota of Wilkesboro, we're here to *Serve you!* Our staff is 100% dedicated to customer satisfaction and we understand that you need clear, transparent information throughout the car buying process. With our live market pricing philosophy, we offer the right cars at the right price, and the transparency to back it up! Classic Toyota of Wilkesboro is located at 1511 W D St North Wilkesboro NC 28659.
